Linea's Meme Manifesto boosts creativity in Web3 with a focus on meme coins - promoting innovation and engagement.
news.summary: Linea’s latest initiative, the Meme Manifesto, is geared towards empowering developers and communities within the crypto sector through an emphasis on creativity, engagement, and innovation, particularly in relation to meme coins. This strategic approach seeks to facilitate growth and collaboration in the industry.

Ukraine’s President Zelenskiyand US Envoy to Ukraine Kellogg take no media questions on the US' request.
Carvana's Q4 revenue: $3.55B, EPS: 56 cents. Sold 114,379 vehicles, 50% YoY. Net income $159M, net margin 4.5%.
news.summary: Carvana Co (NYSE: CVNA) is experiencing a decline in stock prices following the release of its fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported $3.55 billion in revenue for Q4, surpassing estimates of $3.31 billion. The Q4 earnings per share (EPS) stood at 56 cents, exceeding the estimated 21 cents. In the same period, Carvana sold 114,379 vehicles, marking a 50% increase from the previous year. The total revenue also saw a 46% year-over-year increase, with a net income of $159 million and a net income margin of 4.5% in Q4. Carvana's performance led to it being recognized as the most profitable public automotive retailer in U.S. history by achieving an Adjusted EBITDA margin in 2024, while maintaining industry-leading growth. For a detailed report, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bilibili Q4 revenue $1.06B, up 22% YoY, DAUs 103M, MAUs 340M, CEO optimistic about AI. Stock price rises post-report.
news.summary: Bilibili Inc. (NASDAQ: BILI) announced its fiscal fourth-quarter revenue of $1.06 billion (7.73 billion Chinese yuan), marking a 22% increase from the previous year. This figure closely aligned with the analyst consensus of $1.07 billion. The platform's adjusted EPADS stood at $0.15, surpassing the analyst estimate of $0.14. Following the disclosure, the stock price experienced an increase. The platform observed a rise in its average daily active users (DAUs) to 103.0 million compared to 100.1 million in the previous year. Additionally, the monthly active users (MAUs) reached 340 million in the fourth quarter. For further information, the complete news article can be accessed.

news.headline: InvestCloud partners with Apollo to launch Private Markets Account Network in 2024 for integrated management of public and private assets.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, a leading wealth technology company, InvestCloud, has teamed up with Apollo (NYSE: APO) to establish the Private Markets Account Network (PMA Network). The innovative Private Markets Account (PMA) was introduced in December 2024, marking a notable advancement. Distinctly provided by InvestCloud, this PMA integrates both public and private assets on a unified platform, promising a smooth wealth management journey for financial advisors and their clients.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: Tariffs won't cause inflation or recession.
W.Capra appoints Tony Miller as new partner to enhance M&A services in Chicago. Announcement follows the launch of new M&A service two months ago.
news.summary: In Chicago, W. Capra, a leading consulting and services firm, has named Tony Miller as Partner. He will concentrate on expanding W. Capra’s M&A services. This update follows the recent launch of a new service focusing on early-stage Mergers & Acquisitions for the Convenience and Downstream Energy Retailing sector, overseen by Partner Lisa Biggs. The appointment of Tony Miller aims to further strengthen the company's presence in this industry.

Airbus Q4 revenue up 8% at 24.716 billion euros, EPS 3.07 euros (YoY increase), order intake 103.5 billion euros, order book 629 billion euros.
news.summary: Airbus SE (OTC:EADSY) announced a fourth-quarter revenue increase of 8% to 24.716 billion euros, surpassing expectations of 24.567 billion euros. The EBIT adjusted for the quarter saw a 16% rise, attributed to higher commercial aircraft deliveries, reduced R&D costs, and robust performance in Airbus Helicopters' programs and services. Earnings per share stood at 3.07 euros, a significant increase from the previous year's 1.85 euros, exceeding the anticipated 2.43 euros. Segment-wise sales for the quarter were as follows: Airbus 17.767 billion euros (+9% YoY), Airbus Helicopters 3.066 billion euros (+15% YoY), and Airbus Defence and Space 4.473 billion euros (+3% YoY). Despite a decrease in order intake to 103.5 billion euros from the previous year's 186.5 billion euros, the order book saw growth, reaching 629 billion euros compared to 554 billion euros. The increase was driven by a book-to-bill ratio above 1 and a stronger U.S. dollar. The company achieved a strong order intake in all business segments in 2024.

Anbio Biotechnology completes IPO, selling 1.6 million shares at $5 each; now trading on Nasdaq as "NNNN".
news.summary: German-based Anbio Biotechnology, a leading diagnostic company specializing in medical technology and in vitro diagnostics, recently completed its initial public offering of 1,600,000 Class A ordinary shares at a price of US$5.00 per share. The shares are now listed on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol "NNNN" as of February 19, 2025.

Global disposable syringes market to reach USD 17 billion by 2035, with a CAGR of 6.1%. Key players include Becton, Dickinson and Company, aiming for market expansion through technological innovations and collaborations.
news.summary: The global disposable syringes market is expected to grow significantly, with projections showing an increase from around USD 8.82 billion in 2024 to over USD 17 billion by 2035, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.1%. This growth is driven by factors such as the rising adoption of injectable medications, increasing demand for sustainable disposable solutions, and advancements in syringe design. Disposable syringes are single-use medical devices used for various medical procedures and are essential for minimizing cross-contamination and ensuring patient safety. Key players in the industry include Becton, Dickinson and Company, Injex Surgical Industries, and McKesson Medical-Surgical Inc. Recent developments include BD announcing increased investment in U.S. manufacturing for medical devices and Genixus building a production facility for the KinetiX syringe. Companies are focusing on technological innovations and collaborations to enhance syringe safety and usability.

Cory Watson Attorneys raises awareness on cancer caused by chemical exposure during Cancer Prevention Month and beyond.
news.summary: In Birmingham, Alabama, on February 20, 2025, legal firm Cory Watson Attorneys is observing Cancer Prevention Month by focusing on raising awareness about cancer resulting from chemical exposure. The firm, with a proven track record in managing cases involving toxic substances, particularly highlights issues related to Aqueous Film Forming Foam. This initiative aims to educate the public about the risks associated with chemical exposure and emphasizes the importance of preventing cancer.

news.headline: Captivate, in partnership with Videri, launches Captivate CANVAS, a modern digital display solution in proptech.
news.summary: In New York on February 20, 2025, Captivate, a leading proptech company blending utility and amenity services, introduced Captivate CANVAS, a cutting-edge digital display solution. Captivate specializes in providing tailored news, entertainment, and tenant engagement, catering to a large audience.

OpenText launches AI-powered cybersecurity cloud offering to process billions of machine events and integrate with Microsoft Security tools. #OTEX
news.summary: A new AI-powered threat defense system is set to analyze billions of machine events and easily combine with current security solutions to enhance detection response and minimize risks for users of Microsoft Security tools. OpenText, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol OTEX and on TSX under the symbol OTEX, is behind this innovative technology. This advancement, announced on February 20, 2025, in Waterloo, aims to provide a robust security framework for users, leveraging AI capabilities to process vast amounts of data effectively.

news.headline: BioMarin's stock rose as Q4 showed growth, exceeding consensus: EPS 92 cents, sales $747.31M, FY 2025 outlook strong.
news.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical Inc. (NASDAQ: BMRN) announced impressive financial results for the fourth quarter, reporting an adjusted EPS of 92 cents, a significant increase from the 49 cents reported a year ago, surpassing the consensus estimate of 53 cents. The company's total sales amounted to $747.31 million, exceeding the consensus of $713.44 million, with total revenues showing a 16% year-over-year increase, primarily due to contributions from Voxzogo new patient starts across all regions. Within the quarter, revenue from BioMarin's Enzyme Therapies grew by 9%, fueled by rising patient demand worldwide and the timing of substantial government orders in select international markets. Looking ahead, BioMarin Pharmaceutical anticipates a fiscal year 2025 adjusted EPS in the range of $4.20 to $4.40, compared to the consensus of $3.04, alongside projected sales for 2025 between $3.1 billion and $3.2 billion versus a consensus of $3.11 billion. The company remains optimistic about the upcoming year, anticipating robust execution and growth.

Nebius Group N.V. reports a revenue of $37.9 million in Q4 2024, a 466% increase YoY. Adjusted EBITDA loss: $75.5 million.
news.summary: In Amsterdam, Nebius Group N.V. disclosed its unaudited financial outcomes for Q4 and full year 2024. The company, listed on NASDAQ as NBIS, is a prominent AI infrastructure entity. In Q4 2024, Nebius Group saw a revenue surge of 466% YoY, tallying $37.9 million. This boost was predominantly powered by the core AI infrastructure segment posting a 602% YoY growth. However, the adjusted EBITDA loss hit $75.5 million in Q4 2024. The net loss from cont... was not disclosed in the release.

news.headline: Nigeria loyalty programs market to grow by 18.6% annually to reach $241.7 million by 2025, driven by e-commerce.
news.summary: A report titled "Nigeria Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty programs market in Nigeria is projected to experience a significant growth, with an expected annual increase of 18.6%. By the year 2025, the market is forecasted to reach a value of US$241.7 million. Over the past years, the loyalty market in Nigeria has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 20.5% in terms of value. This report provides insights on over 50 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) related to loyalty programs trends across various end-use sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

news.headline: HKMA cautions about fake banking websites and scams linked to The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited.
news.summary: The public has been cautioned by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority about potential scams on the rise, particularly involving fraudulent websites and phishing attempts related to The Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited. These schemes aim to deceive individuals into sharing sensitive information, posing a significant risk. It is imperative for people to remain vigilant, with reported cases on the surge. The alert serves to safeguard individuals against falling victim to such tactics and highlights the necessity of adopting precautionary measures to ensure online safety.

news.headline: Matthews International Corporation announces shareholders elected all three director nominees at 2025 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: Matthews International Corporation, a company listed on NASDAQ GSM under the symbol MATW, is marking its 175th year in operation. Following the recent 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, it has been revealed that all three of the company's director nominees - Terry L. Dunlap, Alvaro Garcia-Tunon, and J. Michael Nauman - have been elected to the Board of Directors. This decision was based on preliminary vote results obtained from the proxy solicitor.

news.headline: Mexico's President Sheinbaum: Mexico seeks a price deal with gasoline sellers.
Implications of crypto-hawala transactions: Examining challenges in merging informal remittance market with digital currencies.
news.summary: An investigation into the informal hawala remittance and transaction system reveals the complex issues it presents when integrated with cryptocurrencies. The hawala network, estimated to be worth trillions of dollars annually, operates outside traditional banking channels and regulations. Combining this system with cryptocurrencies introduces unique challenges, such as regulatory oversight, money laundering risks, and potential security threats. Understanding the intersection of hawala and cryptocurrencies is essential given their significant impact on global financial systems and the potential for illicit activities to thrive in these unregulated spaces.

news.headline: iQIYI priced US$350 million upsized offering of 4.625% convertible senior notes due 2030, concurrent with $300 million repurchases.
news.summary: In Beijing on February 20, 2025, iQIYI, Inc. (Nasdaq: IQ), a prominent provider of online entertainment video services in China, disclosed the pricing details of its increased offering, known as the Notes Offering. This offering consists of US$350 million in aggregate principal amount of 4.625% convertible senior notes due 2030. The Notes will carry an interest rate of 4.625% annually, with payments made quarterly in arrears on March 15, June 15, September 15, and December 15 of each year, commencing from June 15, 2025. Unless repurchased, redeemed, or converted as per the terms outlined, the Notes are set to mature on March 15, 2030.

news.headline: Xerox declares dividend: $0.125/share on Common Stock, $20.00/share on Preferred Stock. Payable in April 2025.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.125 per share on Xerox Holdings Corporation Common Stock. This dividend will be paid on April 30, 2025, to shareholders who are on record as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, the board has announced a quarterly dividend of $20.00 per share on the outstanding Xerox Holdings Series A Convertible Perpetual Preferred Stock. This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2025.

news.headline: Report predicts growth in medical device market (2025-2030) driven by aging populations in developing countries. Wearable devices also accelerate globally. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A new report titled "Medical Device Market, 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the market for traditional and connected medical devices, analyzing factors such as device type, function, durability, therapeutic segment, risk classification, manufacture method, and more. Market sizing and segmentation are provided for wearable, implanted, and portable medical devices, encompassing a wide range of factors. This comprehensive analysis covers various regions and offers insights into the industry up to 2030.

news.headline: PulteGroup tests robotic-assisted construction at TerraWalk in Babcock Ranch, a solar-powered town. Partnered with FBR.
news.summary: In Atlanta, PulteGroup, a prominent homebuilder listed on NYSE as PHM, conducted a successful trial of robotic-assisted construction in the TerraWalk community at Babcock Ranch. This community is located in America's inaugural solar-powered town. The initiative showcases PulteGroup's commitment to pushing boundaries in homebuilding by incorporating cutting-edge technology. Partnering with FBR, an Australia-based company, the test reflects PulteGroup's dedication to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: TKM Grupp AS annual shareholders' meeting on 17th March 2025 at Tallinn, Viking Motors dealership, Tammsaare tee 51.
news.summary: TKM Grupp AS, with registry code 10223439 and headquartered at Kaubamaja 1, 10143 Tallinn, has scheduled its annual general meeting of shareholders for March 17, 2025, at 12 p.m. The meeting will be held in Tallinn at the Viking Motors dealership located at Tammsaare tee 51.

news.headline: Harvest Care Medical in West Virginia receives $4 million refinance deal to support growth in cannabis market.
news.summary: A prominent cannabis company in West Virginia, Harvest Care Medical, has recently finalized a refinancing agreement worth $4 million. This significant financial transaction is designed to support the company's efforts to grow its operations and enhance financial efficiency by lowering monthly debt servicing costs. Kevin Gibbs, the founder and board member of Harvest Care Medical, emphasized that this refinancing showcases their dedication to fostering expansion while upholding responsible financial practices.

news.headline: Xiao-I Corp. launches tAIkbox 1, transforming automated calls for better customer service in the U.S. trailblazer in AI.
news.summary: Today in Rockville, Maryland, Xiao-I Corporation (NASDAQ: AIXI), a leading company in artificial intelligence, introduced tAIkbox 1 to the U.S. market. This innovative AI-powered device is expected to revolutionize customer service. Unlike traditional automated systems, tAIkbox 1 aims to provide a more seamless and user-friendly experience. This launch signifies Xiao-I Corporation's commitment to enhancing customer service with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: CredCore secures $16M in Series A funding to innovate enterprise debt investment with AI. Led by Avataar Ventures.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, CredCore, a vertical-AI firm revolutionizing debt capital markets for lenders and borrowers, disclosed a $16 million investment in Series A. The funding round was spearheaded by Avataar Ventures, along with contributions from Inspired Capital, Fitch Group, and BellTower Partners.

news.headline: Copado debuts 3 AI-Powered DevOps apps on Slack Marketplace, aiming to streamline Salesforce dev.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Copado, a prominent DevOps provider for business applications, unveiled three innovative AI-driven DevOps applications designed for use within Slack. These cutting-edge apps are now accessible in the Slack Marketplace, offering a secure platform to enhance Salesforce application development processes. With these tools, teams can significantly boost their efficiency and expedite the development of their projects.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors teams up with EO Charging for fleet electrification, offering cost-effective EV solutions.
news.summary: In Oak Park, Michigan on February 20, 2025, Bollinger Motors, Inc. revealed a significant collaboration with EO Charging, a leading global firm specialized in electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions for depot-based fleets. This partnership aims to deliver all-encompassing electrification solutions for Bollinger.

news.headline: Brightspeed is expanding lightning-fast internet to 60K locations in Indiana, aiming for 65K more. #TechNews #InternetExpansion
news.summary: A significant construction project is currently in progress in Indiana to bring high-speed internet to an additional 65,000 addresses. Brightspeed, the third-largest fiber broadband provider in the country, is leading the effort to enhance connectivity for more households and businesses. The initiative aims to ensure that these locations have access to ultrafast and dependable internet services.

news.headline: Sports.com, owned by Lottery.com, partners with Soccerex for 24 months, sponsoring 6 events, including Cairo kickoff.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas-based company Sports.com, under Lottery.com Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRY, LTRYW), has sealed a significant deal with Soccerex as the official title sponsor for the next 24 months. This partnership will see Sports.com backing six key Soccerex events across the globe, with prominent locations such as Cairo, Amsterdam, and Miami set for 2025.
